creator: freebsd.org@reg.a0fs.net
text:
On install bash-5.1.4, some error appear:

---- 8< -------------
[9/9] Extracting bash-5.1.4: 100%
pkg: Failed to execute lua script: [string "shell_path = pkg.prefixed_path("bin/bash")..."]:7: attempt to index a nil value (global 'shell')
pkg: lua script failed

---- 8< -------------

Env info: 
  freebsd-version -u : 11.4-RELEASE-p6
  pkg -v             : 1.15.10
